title: Automations plugin configuration
description: Per-plugin (global) configuration for the automation-plugin. Governs default run visibility, run retention, and which scopes are scanned. Per-automation `automation.yaml` fields override these defaults. See change: add-automation-plugin.

defaultVisibility.description: Effective board visibility applied to automation runs whose `automation.yaml` omits a `visibility` field. `hidden` keeps runs off the main board (still visible in the Automation view); `shown` renders them as normal board cards.

retentionPerAutomation.description: Maximum run records kept per automation. Oldest-first pruning trims beyond this count.

scanFolderScope.description: When true, scan `<repo>/.pi/automation/` for per-folder automations.

scanGlobalScope.description: When true, scan `~/.pi/automation/` for global automations.

defaultModel.description: Fallback provider/model id used when an automation's `@role` cannot be resolved at spawn time. Empty means the shell's default model is used.
